message:
fix: pin endpoint snapshots backend to state file, model endpoint reads it (#119)

When CLI is pinned, the model endpoint was reading currentBackend from
statusCache which could be stale (showing the pre-switch CLI). Now:

1. Pin endpoint writes current backend to /var/run/agent-backends/<agent>
   at pin time so there's an authoritative source of truth
2. Model endpoint reads from backend state file when CLI is pinned,
   not from potentially-stale statusCache
3. Fixes: pin copilot, switch model to haiku → gets claude instead of copilot

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
